title: Florence + The Machine — Everybody Scream Tour
location: State Farm Arena, 1 State Farm Dr, Atlanta, GA 30303
description: Florence + The Machine brings their theatrical, breathtaking performance to State Farm Arena. Perfect for couples who love indie pop, dramatic vocals, and an unforgettable concert experience. Arrive early, dress fancy, and let her voice sweep you off your feet.

title: Green Market — Piedmont Park Farmers Market
location: Piedmont Park, 1345 Piedmont Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30309
description: Atlanta's beloved weekly farmers market with fresh produce, local artisan goods, and good coffee. Great Saturday morning date — stroll the park, grab fresh food, and support local vendors. Arrive early to beat the crowd.

title: BAILAtlanta — Cuban Dance Weekend
location: Academy Ballroom ATL, 800 Miami Cir NE, Atlanta, GA 30324
description: Atlanta's premier Cuban salsa and dance weekend featuring 14 dance workshops, 4 DJs, professional instructors, and multiple parties. Whether you're seasoned dancers or curious beginners, this is a vibrant, sexy, and welcoming scene — perfect for couples who want to learn to dance together.

title: Garden Grooves — Atlanta Botanical Garden
location: Atlanta Botanical Garden, 1345 Piedmont Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30309
description: A morning of live music and good vibes in one of Atlanta's most beautiful settings. Bring your partner, walk through the gardens, and enjoy the curated tunes. A calm, romantic way to spend a Sunday morning.

title: SALSAtlanta Bachata Nights
location: Academy Ballroom ATL, 800 Miami Cir NE, Atlanta, GA 30324
description: Bachata Nights at Academy Ballroom — smooth, sensual, and a blast to dance. Great atmosphere for couples learning Latin dance styles together. Beginner-friendly with instructors on hand.

title: Euro Atlanta — I Love Reggae Fridays
location: Euro Atl, 1265 Powers Ferry Rd, Marietta, GA 30067
description: Reggae, Dancehall, Soca, and AfroBeats all night at Euro Atlanta. Free entry, free parking, and incredible Jamaican food — oxtails that fall off the bone, snapper that snaps. Great drinks, great vibes, and no cover charge. Every Friday night — a reliable, fun date option.

title: Cold & Idle Heirs — The Masquerade
location: The Masquerade Atlanta, 695 North Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30308
description: Atlanta's iconic indie venue hosts Cold for a special show with Idle Heirs and Intension. Great underground vibe, affordable tickets, and walking distance from Virginia-Highland bars for pre-show or post-show drinks. Perfect for couples who like alternative rock and a low-key night.

title: BAILAtlanta — Dance Weekend Continues
location: Academy Ballroom ATL, 800 Miami Cir NE, Atlanta, GA 30324
description: The BAILAtlanta dance weekend continues with more workshops, DJ sets, and salsa parties. Register ahead for the full experience. A memorable weekend for couples who love dance, music, and culture.

title: Dustin Nickerson — Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30307
price: Couple's Package: $90 (2 premium seats + $45 food/bev credit each)
description: Seattle-born comic whose marriage-and-parenting humor will make you both cry laughing. The Couple's Package gets you two premium seats plus a $90 food and beverage credit. Great date night — laughs, food, and no kids around. 18+ venue.

title: Dustin Nickerson — Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30307
description: Catch Dustin Nickerson on Saturday night for the same great Couple's Package deal. Arrive early for best seats and grab dinner at the club before the show. One of the best comedy date nights in Atlanta.

title: Dustin Nickerson — Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta, GA 30307
description: Sunday night comedy — a quieter, more intimate show for couples. The Couple's Package is an absolute steal at $90 for two premium seats and a full food/bev credit. One of the most underrated date nights in the city.

title: Euro Atlanta — I Love Reggae Fridays
location: Euro Atl, 1265 Powers Ferry Rd, Marietta, GA 30067
description: Reggae, Dancehall, Soca, and AfroBeats all night at Euro Atlanta. Free entry, free parking, and incredible Jamaican food — oxtails that fall off the bone, snapper that snaps. Great drinks, great vibes, and no cover charge. Every Friday night.

title: Unbound Narratives: Embodied Language — Atlanta Contemporary
location: Atlanta Contemporary, 535 Means St NW, Atlanta, GA 30318
description: A striking group exhibition at Atlanta Contemporary exploring language through the body. Thought-provoking, visually rich, and completely free. After the gallery, walk the West Side Provisions district for dinner. Great for couples who love art and conversation.

title: Euro Atlanta — I Love Reggae Fridays
location: Euro Atl, 1265 Powers Ferry Rd, Marietta, GA 30067
description: Reggae, Dancehall, Soca, and AfroBeats all night at Euro Atlanta. Free entry, free parking, and incredible Jamaican food — oxtails that fall off the bone, snapper that snaps. Great drinks, great vibes, and no cover charge. Every Friday night.
